description: When the daemon detects new commits on main (after merging task branches), automatically run cargo ao-bin-build and restart the runner process so the running daemon always uses the latest binary. This prevents the recurring issue where merged code changes (like IPC auth, dependency updates) cause runner health check failures because the running binary is stale. Implement as a post-merge hook or a scheduler tick check that compares the current binary build ID against the latest git HEAD.
title: Auto-rebuild binaries and restart runner when main branch changes
